_instructions: Add missing transmission lines here as GeoJSON LineString features.
properties.state: state code e.g. NSW, VIC, QLD, SA, TAS (optional)
properties.notes: any extra notes you want shown in the tooltip (optional)
After editing this file, run:  python src/build_leaflet.py
Lines appear on the map as dashed overlays when 'Manual transmission lines' is ticked.
Example feature (remove the leading // to activate):

properties.name: Example Line VIC
properties.notes: This is an example line in Victoria.
